sentences: The library closes at nine o'clock on weekdays.

Our flight has been delayed because of the storm.
She prefers drinking coffee without milk or sugar.
The new bridge connects the two sides of the river.
I usually go jogging early in the morning before breakfast.
They built a small wooden cabin by the lake.
The teacher explained the difficult grammar rule carefully.
She bought a beautiful red dress for the wedding.
